basic_details.job_title: BMC Veterinary Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 11 Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Brihanmumbai Municipal Corporation (BMC) has officially announced the Veterinary Officer Recruitment 2026 with 11 openings. The detailed notification was published on 26 February 2026 at www.mcgm.gov.in . Candidates who meet the age criteria of up to 38 years and hold a Bachelor’s degree in Veterinary Science (B.V.Sc. & A.H.) can now submit their offline applications from 24 April 2026 to 15 May 2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply offline are shared below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 38 years Age relaxation is applicable up to 43 years for backward class candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor’s degree in Veterinary Science (B.V.Sc. & A.H.)
qualification.details: Bachelor’s degree in Veterinary Science (B.V.Sc. & A.H.) from a recognized university. Registered with the State Veterinary Council / Veterinary Council of India under the Indian Veterinary Council Act, 1984. Passed Marathi subject (Higher or Lower level) with 100 marks in SSC / equivalent or HSC / equivalent examination. CCC / O level / A level / B level / C level certificate of DOEACC Society OR MS-CIT or GECT certificate of Maharashtra State Higher & Technical Education Board OR other approved computer course.

selection_process: Walk-in Selection based on percentage of marks in B.V.Sc. & A.H. degree Merit list preparation (deduction for multiple attempts) Document verification (top 25 candidates if more than 50 applications)
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for BMC Veterinary Officer Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: mcgm.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BMC Veterinary Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for submitting the offline application for the BMC Veterinary Officer recruitment is 15th May 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Veterinary Officer post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor’s degree in Veterinary Science (B.V.Sc. & A.H.) from a recognized university, along with specific Marathi language proficiency and a computer course certificate.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Veterinary Officer position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Veterinary Officer post is 38 years. Age relaxation is provided for backward class candidates, extending the upper age limit to 43 years.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Veterinary Officer post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 11 vacancies for the Veterinary Officer post announced by the Brihanmumbai Municipal Corporation (BMC).

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Veterinary Officer role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Veterinary Officer position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 90,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for the BMC Veterinary Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee for General/OBC category candidates is ₹933/-, which includes ₹790/- and 18% GST of ₹143/-. Specific fees for other categories are not detailed here.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Veterinary Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a walk-in selection based on the percentage of marks in the B.V.Sc. & A.H. degree, followed by merit list preparation and document verification.

faq.question: Q8. Is the application process online or offline?
faq.answer: The application process for the BMC Veterinary Officer recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post or as instructed.

faq.question: Q9. What is the walk-in date for the selection process?
faq.answer: The walk-in selection date for the Veterinary Officer post is 18th May 2026. This date applies to candidates scoring 70% and above, as well as those scoring 50% and above.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of the Brihanmumbai Municipal Corporation (BMC). Links are provided in the Important Links section of this article.
